# Curriculum V3.0 project map

The six projects turn instructional prerequisites into reproducible capability evidence.

## 1. `project-math-to-code` — 从公式到可验证代码 / From formulas to verified code

- Prerequisites: `gradient-descent`, `monte-carlo`
- Capabilities: `formula-to-code`, `numerical-verification`
- Deliverables: `reproducible-config`, `baseline`, `controlled-improvement`, `metrics-and-plots`, `failure-examples`, `formula-code-behavior-explanation`, `limitations-reflection`
- Evidence: `executable-artifact`, `metric-backed-claim`, `documented-failure-case`

## 2. `project-tabular-regression` — 表格回归全流程 / End-to-end tabular regression

- Prerequisites: `linear-regression`, `data-exploration-pipelines`
- Capabilities: `data-pipeline`, `honest-baseline`, `residual-analysis`
- Deliverables: `reproducible-config`, `baseline`, `controlled-improvement`, `metrics-and-plots`, `failure-examples`, `formula-code-behavior-explanation`, `limitations-reflection`
- Evidence: `executable-artifact`, `metric-backed-claim`, `documented-failure-case`

## 3. `project-classification-evaluation` — 分类决策与评估 / Classification decisions and evaluation

- Prerequisites: `classification`, `model-selection`
- Capabilities: `threshold-decision`, `cross-validation`, `leakage-diagnosis`
- Deliverables: `reproducible-config`, `baseline`, `controlled-improvement`, `metrics-and-plots`, `failure-examples`, `formula-code-behavior-explanation`, `limitations-reflection`
- Evidence: `executable-artifact`, `metric-backed-claim`, `documented-failure-case`

## 4. `project-neural-representation` — 神经表示诊断 / Neural representation diagnostics

- Prerequisites: `optimizer-comparison`, `cnn-visualization`
- Capabilities: `backprop-implementation`, `optimizer-comparison`, `representation-inspection`
- Deliverables: `reproducible-config`, `baseline`, `controlled-improvement`, `metrics-and-plots`, `failure-examples`, `formula-code-behavior-explanation`, `limitations-reflection`
- Evidence: `executable-artifact`, `metric-backed-claim`, `documented-failure-case`

## 5. `project-small-transformer` — 训练小型 Transformer / Train a small Transformer

- Prerequisites: `decoding-sampling`
- Capabilities: `causal-language-model`, `training-loop`, `sampling`
- Deliverables: `reproducible-config`, `baseline`, `controlled-improvement`, `metrics-and-plots`, `failure-examples`, `formula-code-behavior-explanation`, `limitations-reflection`
- Evidence: `executable-artifact`, `metric-backed-claim`, `documented-failure-case`

## 6. `project-llm-application` — 可靠的 LLM 应用 / Reliable LLM application

- Prerequisites: `peft-lora`, `llm-evaluation-reliability`
- Capabilities: `parameter-efficient-adaptation`, `rag-evaluation`, `hallucination-analysis`
- Deliverables: `reproducible-config`, `baseline`, `controlled-improvement`, `metrics-and-plots`, `failure-examples`, `formula-code-behavior-explanation`, `limitations-reflection`
- Evidence: `executable-artifact`, `metric-backed-claim`, `documented-failure-case`
